title: Starship at 12 Flights: What SpaceX Has Actually Proven (and What's Still Hype)
subtitle: SpaceX's Starship has completed 12 test flights as of May 2026 — but zero commercial payload missions. The aspirational $100/kg target is still ahead.
summary: SpaceX's Starship has completed 12 test flights as of May 2026 — but zero commercial payload missions. The aspirational $100/kg target is still ahead. Starlink V3 deployment on Starship hasn't begun.

image.caption: Starship at 12 Flights: What SpaceX Has Actually Proven (and What's Still Hype)

bodyHtml: SpaceX's Starship has completed 12 test flights as of May 2026 — but zero commercial payload missions. The aspirational $100/kg target is still ahead. Starlink V3 deployment on Starship hasn't begun.
